---
title: "Women's age and marriage: the trend throughout the 19th century Denmark"
author: "Ida-Bella Bach Greve & Kristine Xenia Storgaard Soendberg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)

setwd("~/Desktop/DAM")
```

# Introduction

This report analyzes census data from 1801, 1834, 1845, and 1860.
The focus is on age, gender, and marital status distributions.

---

# Kvinder (Women)

## Women aged 20–30

# 1801

```{r women-1801-young}
data_1801_young <- read_csv("census-1801-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1801_young <- data_1801_young %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 31,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1801_young, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "1801: Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1801-pie}
clean_data_1801_young %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "1801: Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

# 1834

```{r women-1834-young}
data_1834_young <- read_csv("census-1834-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1834_young <- data_1834_young %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 31,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1834_young, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "1834: Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1834-pie}
clean_data_1834_young %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "1834: Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

# 1845

```{r women-1845-young}
data_1845_young <- read_csv("census-1845-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1845_young <- data_1845_young %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    age > 19,
    age < 31,
    !is.na(marital_status),
    marital_status != "",
    !is.na(gender),
    gender != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1845_young, aes(x = age, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "1845: Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1845-pie}
clean_data_1845_young %>%
  count(marital_status) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "1845: Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

# 1860

```{r women-1860-young}
data_1860_young <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1860_young <- data_1860_young %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 31,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1860_young, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "1860: Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1860-pie}
clean_data_1860_young %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "1860: Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

## Women aged 30–40

# 1801

```{r women-1801-ext}
data_1801_ext <- read_csv("census-1801-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1801_ext <- data_1801_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 29,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1801_ext, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1801-pie-ext}
clean_data_1801_ext %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

# 1834

```{r women-1834-ext}
data_1834_ext <- read_csv("census-1834-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1834_ext <- data_1834_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 29,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1834_ext, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1834-pie-ext}
clean_data_1834_ext %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

# 1845

```{r women-1845-ext}
data_1845_ext <- read_csv("census-1845-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1845_ext <- data_1845_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    age > 29,
    !is.na(age),
    age < 41,
    !is.na(marital_status),
    marital_status != "",
    !is.na(gender),
    gender != "mand"
  )


# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1845_ext, aes(x = age, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1845-pie-ext}
clean_data_1845_ext %>%
  count(marital_status) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )

```

---

# 1860

```{r women-1860-ext}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1860_ext <- data_1860_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 29,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1860_ext, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r women-1860-pie-ext}
clean_data_1860_ext %>%
  count(civilstand) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Marital Status Distribution",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  )
```

---

## Women aged 20–40

# 1801

```{r women-1801-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1801_kplus <- data_1801_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1801_kplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1834

```{r women-1834-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1834_kplus <- data_1834_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1834_kplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1845

```{r women-1845-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1845_kplus <- data_1845_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    age > 19,
    !is.na(age),
    age < 41,
    !is.na(marital_status),
    marital_status != "",
    !is.na(gender),
    gender != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1845_kplus, aes(x = age, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1860

```{r women-1860-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1860_kplus <- data_1860_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "mand"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1860_kplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# Mænd (Men) 

## Men aged 20–40

# 1801

```{r men-1801-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1801_mplus <- data_1801_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "kvinde"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1801_mplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1834

```{r men-1834-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1834_mplus <- data_1834_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "kvinde"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1834_mplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1845

```{r men-1845-plus}
data_1845_ext <- read_csv("census-1845-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1845_mplus <- data_1845_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    age > 19,
    !is.na(age),
    age < 41,
    !is.na(marital_status),
    marital_status != "",
    !is.na(gender),
    gender != "kvinde"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1845_mplus, aes(x = age, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# 1860

```{r men-1860-plus}
data_1860_ext <- read_csv("census-1860-normalized.csv")

clean_data_1860_mplus <- data_1860_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    !is.na(alder),
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != "kvinde"
  )

# Histogram
ggplot(clean_data_1860_mplus, aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Age and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

# Men and Women Comparison

## 1801

```{r both-1801}
clean_data_1801_extplus <- data_1801_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != ""
  )

# Graph
ggplot(clean_data_1801_extplus,
       aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ koen) +
  labs(
    title = "1801: Age, Gender and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## 1834

```{r both-1834}
clean_data_1834_extplus <- data_1834_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != ""
  )

# Graph
ggplot(clean_data_1834_extplus,
       aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ koen) +
  labs(
    title = "1834: Age, Gender and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## 1845

```{r both-1845}
clean_data_1845_extplus <- data_1845_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age),
    age > 19,
    age < 41,
    !is.na(marital_status),
    marital_status != "",
    !is.na(gender),
    gender != ""
  )

# Graph
ggplot(clean_data_1845_extplus,
       aes(x = age, fill = marital_status)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ gender) +
  labs(
    title = "1845: Age, Gender and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## 1860

```{r both-1860}
clean_data_1860_extplus <- data_1860_ext %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(alder),
    alder > 19,
    alder < 41,
    !is.na(civilstand),
    civilstand != "",
    !is.na(koen),
    koen != ""
  )

# Graph
ggplot(clean_data_1860_extplus,
       aes(x = alder, fill = civilstand)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ koen) +
  labs(
    title = "1860: Age, Gender and Marital Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Marital Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
